notes: Windows NT developer. In 1995 signed business agreement with anonymous Fortune 100 company mandating total Microsoft adoption.
Original OS/2 developer. The Company had 12,000 IBM OS/2-based call center clients replaced by NT under the 1995 mandate.

Company anonymized in study. Had 35,000 desktops, 12,000 OS/2 call center clients. Founded early 1970s, grew rapidly using technology. Described as a 'David vs. Goliath' business school success story.
Published this independent case study. Aberdeen OnSite Analyst conducted multi-month on-site interviews. Received background from Microsoft competitors.
